# blackBlock

**Instance Property**

The bit pattern for a block of black pixels.  If absent, black is assumed to be all zeros. Otherwise, this should be [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelFormatDescription/PixelLayout/bitsPerBlock] bits long. If bitsPerBlock is less than a byte, repeat the bit pattern for the full byte.

## Declaration

```swift
var blackBlock: Data?
```
title: blackBlock
